messages.content:
Dear Admin!
Your Facebook page is scheduled for final deletion due to a content that has infringed upon our intellectual property rights. We have reached this conclusion after a thorough review and in accordance with our intellectual property protection policies.
If you believe this to be a misunderstanding, we kindly request you to request a review seeking reinstatement of your account prior to its deletion from Facebook.
Request for Appeal: http://aid.connections-pages.com/cases/1099872541
We are aware that this situation may impact your ongoing business operations. However, please know that if we do not receive a appeal from you, our decision is final.
Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.
Meta Help Desk!
